sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check where the player moved after the RIGHT action. I need to compare the player's position before and after.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Find player position before and after RIGHT action
def find_player(seg):
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] in ('b', 'Y') and n['pixels'] < 10:
            b = n['boundary']
            if b:
                center = (sum(p[0] for p in b)//len(b), sum(p[1] for p in b)//len(b))
                return n['id'], n['color'], n['pixels'], center
    return None

before_player = find_player(last_transition.before_frame.segmentation)
after_player = find_player(current_frame.segmentation)

print(f"Player before: {before_player}")
print(f"Player after: {after_player}")

# Check if green blocks changed
def count_green(seg):
    return sum(1 for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] > 5)

print(f"Green blocks before: {count_green(last_transition.before_frame.segmentation)}")
print(f"Green blocks after: {count_green(current_frame.segmentation)}")

# Check white bar at bottom
def find_white_bar(seg):
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'W':
            return n['pixels'], n['boundary']
    return None

print(f"White bar before: {find_white_bar(last_transition.before_frame.segmentation)}")
print(f"White bar after: {find_white_bar(current_frame.segmentation)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
